Metadata.title: Kaixuebang - EdTech & Knowledge Engineering | Mentis & Grader
Metadata.description: Kaixuebang is committed to building full-scenario intelligent infrastructure for education. Our products include: Mentis (K12 LLM Infrastructure), Grader, Daily-AI-Scholar, and Course-Prism. We inject 'master souls' into LLMs and connect the entire chain of learning.
Metadata.keywords: EdTech, Mentis, K12 Knowledge Base, LLM Fine-tuning Data, Smart Campus, AI Education, Textbook-Help, Grader, Course-Prism, Daily-AI-Scholar

Hero.description: Kaixuebang is dedicated to building full-scenario intelligent infrastructure for education. We connect the entire chain of learning, teaching, and evaluation through AI-driven grading, transparent campus academic communities, automated knowledge assistants, and structured knowledge engineering, helping K12 students and college students explore knowledge boundaries more efficiently.

BentoGrid.title: Core Product Matrix
BentoGrid.subtitle: Building intelligent infrastructure for education, empowering efficient knowledge transfer

grader.title: Grader
grader.description: Intelligent grading assistant, releasing teaching potential. AI-driven automatic grading system supporting intelligent scoring and feedback for multiple subjects and question types.

course_prism.title: Course-Prism
course_prism.description: The RateMyProfessor for Chinese campuses. A transparent course evaluation community that is not just a course selection guide, but a closed loop of academic feedback.

daily_ai_scholar.title: Daily-AI-Scholar
daily_ai_scholar.description: An automated learning assistant that pushes selected knowledge and academic frontiers to you every day, making learning more proactive and simple. Currently an automated academic paper reading assistant that automatically selects papers, generates AI summaries, and sends email notifications.

textbook_help.title: Mentis
textbook_help.description: K12 vertical LLM infrastructure based on top school research. We don't make general LLMs; we inject 'master souls' into them. The 'water seller' of educational data in the AI era.
textbook_help.footer: Mentis solves hallucinations and lack of reasoning in educational AI through structured logic.

OpenSource.title: Technical DNA & Open Source
OpenSource.subtitle: We believe in the power of open source and give back core technologies to the developer community

terminal.comment2: # Daily email pushes of selected AI learning content and cutting-edge knowledge

OpenSource.course_prism_desc: Course evaluation and communication community platform
OpenSource.daily_ai_scholar_desc: Automated AI learning assistant, daily email pushes of knowledge
OpenSource.tourchain_desc: Smart campus tour service platform (suspended due to company pivot)

Footer.description: Reshaping knowledge transfer with intelligent infrastructure. Building full-scenario intelligent infrastructure for education, connecting learning, teaching, and evaluation.

About.title: Building Full-Scenario
About.desc1: Founded in Shanghai, Kaixuebang is an innovative enterprise deeply rooted in EdTech and knowledge engineering.
About.desc2: We are committed to connecting the entire chain of learning, teaching, and evaluation through AI-driven innovation and structured knowledge engineering, providing a solid intelligent foundation for education in the digital age.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Reshaping knowledge transfer with intelligent infrastructure. We solve pain points such as information asymmetry and inefficient resource utilization in educational digitalization through AI and knowledge engineering, making high-quality education accessible to all.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: Building the world's leading intelligent foundation for education. In the future, teaching feedback, knowledge acquisition, and academic evaluation will be seamlessly connected through intelligent means, ensuring technology truly serves everyone's lifelong learning.

item1.title: Smart Campus Tour Start
item1.description: Kaixuebang started with the 'Campus Guide' project, improving the campus tour experience through digital means. This experience made us deeply aware of the barriers to information flow in campus scenarios.

item2.title: Building Ed-Intelligent Matrix
item2.description: With the development of AI technology, we began building a comprehensive EdTech product matrix. We launched Grader, Course-Prism, and the 'Textbook-Help' knowledge base, covering both learning and evaluation scenarios.

item3.title: Giving Back to the Community
item3.description: We believe in the power of open source. Through projects like Daily-AI-Scholar, we open-source our internal efficiency tools, hoping to help AI developers and learners worldwide.

join_us.title: Join Us, Reshape the Future
join_us.description: We are a passionate team of experts from computer science, education, design, and more. If you are passionate about EdTech, welcome to contact us.

grader.title: Grader - AI Grading Assistant
grader.description: Releasing teaching potential with AI-driven grading solutions.
grader.positioning_desc: A core component of the full-scenario educational intelligent infrastructure, focusing on improving the efficiency of assignment grading and teaching feedback.
grader.features_desc: AI-driven automated evaluation system, supporting multi-disciplinary knowledge alignment and personalized feedback generation.
grader.video_subtitle: Watch Grader AI Grading Assistant in action

course_prism.title: Course-Prism
course_prism.description: A transparent course evaluation community connecting feedback loops.
course_prism.transparency_desc: Breaking course information silos, assisting students in making wiser academic decisions through real course selection and learning feedback.
course_prism.community_desc: Not just evaluation, but also communication. Building an academic community based on courses to promote continuous improvement in teaching quality.

daily_ai_scholar.title: Daily-AI-Scholar
daily_ai_scholar.description: Daily email pushes of selected AI knowledge to simplify learning.
daily_ai_scholar.workflow_desc: Automatically crawl the latest AI and academic papers from platforms like arXiv, and use LLMs to generate precise summaries.
daily_ai_scholar.reach_desc: Real-time push via email, Webhook, and other forms, making academic frontiers accessible.

textbook_help.title: Mentis
textbook_help.description: K12 Knowledge Graph based on elite pedagogy, providing deterministic truth for LLMs.
textbook_help.core_mission: Making AI explanations more systematic and comprehensible
textbook_help.intro: Mentis is dedicated to transforming knowledge into structured data for deep AI education applications. We build a complete educational knowledge ecosystem through a three-layer architecture.
textbook_help.layer_tool_desc: Open tools for everyone to extract structured data, one-stop conversion from OCR to knowledge graphs
textbook_help.layer_platform_desc: Knowledge data extraction and sharing platform where users can extract data and share with others
textbook_help.layer_service_desc: Educational applications and API services, providing ready-to-use interfaces for developers and institutions
textbook_help.problem: General LLM Flaws: Hallucination, Lack of Reasoning, Data Contamination.
textbook_help.solution: Solution: OCR-to-Graph conversion, empowering training (SFT) and inference (RAG).
textbook_help.problem_p1: Hallucination: Unable to distinguish between textbook versions
textbook_help.problem_p2: Lack of Reasoning: No teacher-like chain of thought
textbook_help.problem_p3: Data Contamination: Mixed quality of training data
textbook_help.solution_p1: OCR to Graph: Atomic decomposition of textbooks into logic graphs
textbook_help.solution_p2: SFT: Providing high-quality datasets for training logic
textbook_help.solution_p3: RAG: External knowledge base ensuring 100% accuracy
